reference: Hi Carolyn, your symptoms are heaviness and aching in both legs, which means you have pain along both thighs and legs. It is important to know if you also have numbness or any altered sensation in the legs and feet. If so, then your problem may stem from a badly strained back with pain radiating down, or even a prolapsed disc. If gabapentin is not helping you, please discontinue its use and consider taking short courses of celecoxib combined with a muscle relaxant. Therapy in a heated pool will be beneficial for you. Good luck, and I hope you feel better soon.
text: Hi, Bram. You're symptoms are heaviness and aching in both legs, which means you have pain along both thighs and legs. It is important to know if you also have numbness or any altered sensation in the legs and feet. If so, then your problem may stem from a badly strained back with pain radiating down, or even a prolapsed discs. If gabapentin is not helping you, please discontinue its use and consider taking short courses of celecoxib combined with a muscle relaxant. Therapy in a heated pool will be beneficial to you. Good luck, and I hope you feel better sooner.
